sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29004" key="dusernh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ερνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n29004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hardly shooting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sprouting</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:231" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.231</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
